purpose: Saudi Founding Day (February 22) content highlighting traditional Saudi heritage elements — Najdi architecture, traditional dress, historical motifs — tied to brand product.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Saudi Founding Day heritage product showcase, {featured_product} placed against traditional Najdi mudbrick wall texture or ornate carved wooden door (manqour pattern), warm amber-gold side lighting suggesting desert sun at golden hour, traditional Saudi woven fabric (sadu pattern) as surface or accent, incense burner (mabkhara) or traditional coffee set as supporting prop, {brand_heritage_element}, rich earthy tones of ochre, burnt sienna, and dark brown, dignified contemplative atmosphere referencing founding of Saudi state in 1727, hyper-realistic surface texture, shot on 50mm at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: modern architecture (must feel traditional/heritage)
Avoid in output: non-Saudi traditional motifs
Avoid in output: portraits without cultural accuracy
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Saudi adaptation guidance: Founding Day Feb 22 commemorates founding of First Saudi State by Imam Muhammad bin Saud in 1727. Najdi visual vocabulary is paramount. Sadu (weaving) and mudbrick textures are primary visual cues. Avoid conflating with National Day aesthetic (different occasion, different palette). Reference image: Optional. Recommended frequency: 1-2 posts on Founding Day week. Compliance level: elevated.
